Home / Services / Lawn Care & Maintenance

Lawn Care & Maintenance

Keeping your lawn healthy and vibrant year-round in the Raleigh climate.

Maintaining a lush, healthy lawn in Raleigh's challenging climate requires expertise and attention to detail. Our lawn care and maintenance service is designed to keep your lawn looking its best year-round. We offer a comprehensive range of services, including mowing, edging, fertilization, weed control, aeration, and overseeding. We understand the specific needs of Raleigh lawns, from dealing with the Piedmont's red clay soil to managing common pests and diseases. Our team uses high-quality, environmentally friendly products and equipment to ensure the health and vitality of your lawn. We also offer specialized services such as soil testing and analysis to identify nutrient deficiencies and tailor our treatments accordingly. Whether you need weekly lawn mowing or a complete lawn renovation, we have the expertise and resources to meet your needs. We understand that a well-maintained lawn is not only aesthetically pleasing but also contributes to the overall health and value of your property. We will keep your lawn healthy and thriving, no matter the season.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Lawn Assessment & Soil Testing
  2. 02 Step 2: Customized Treatment Plan
  3. 03 Step 3: Regular Mowing & Edging
  4. 04 Step 4: Fertilization & Weed Control

Benefits

  • Healthy & Vibrant Lawn
  • Weed & Pest Control
  • Improved Soil Health
  • Increased Property Value

Frequently Asked Questions

How often should I fertilize my lawn in Raleigh?

We recommend fertilizing your lawn 2-3 times per year, typically in the spring and fall, depending on the type of grass and soil conditions.

What types of weed control do you offer?

We offer both pre-emergent and post-emergent weed control options to effectively manage a wide range of weeds in your lawn.

Do you offer organic lawn care options?

Yes, we offer organic lawn care options that utilize natural and environmentally friendly products.
